candidates.question: Find the day of the year that is 73 days after day 42. Then, calculate the percentage change from this new day number to 182. Finally, check if that percentage value lies between 29 and 160.
Calculate an 18% tip on a $296 restaurant bill. Then, multiply this tip amount by 3. Finally, round the resulting product to one decimal place.
Convert 820 kilowatt-hours into megajoules. Then, clamp that converted value so it is between 50 and 208. Finally, check if this clamped value equals 184.

Put the phrase 'ledger summit lantern' inside brackets. Then, count how many characters are in this bracketed phrase. Finally, determine how many whole times the number 7 fits into that character count.

Count the items in this list: 6, 47, 39, 43, 71, 47, 65. Then, see how many values in the list [15, 39, 77, 47, 89] are below that first count. Finally, compute the utilization percentage when that second count of items occupies 1573 warehouse slots.
